   let foundRoute: TRouteLike | undefined =
     routePathname !== undefined ? routesByPath[routePathname] : undefined
+
+  // Even if a direct routesByPath lookup succeeds, it might refer to a less-specific

-  } else {

+  const matchingRoutes: Array<{ route: TRouteLike; params: any }> = []
 
-      return false

+  flatRoutes.forEach((route) => {
+    const matchedParams = getMatchedParams(route)
+    if (matchedParams) {
+      matchingRoutes.push({ route, params: matchedParams })

+  })
+
+  // Pick the best match by preferring routes that contain more static pathname
+  // segments that are present in the URL. This ensures that a route like
+  // `/admin-levels/{-$id}/reports` beats `/admin-levels/$id` when matching
+  // `/admin-levels/reports`.
+  const bestRoute = matchingRoutes.sort((a, b) => {

+      (d) => d.type !== 'pathname' || d.value !== '/',

+    const bSegments = parsePathname(trimPathLeft(b.route.fullPath)).filter(
+      (d) => d.type !== 'pathname' || d.value !== '/',

+    const urlSegments = parsePathname(trimPathLeft(trimmedPath)).filter(
+      (d) => d.type !== 'pathname' || d.value !== '/',
+    )

+    const score = (segs: ReturnType<typeof parsePathname>) =>
+      segs.reduce((acc, seg, i) => {
+        if (seg.type === 'pathname') {
+          const urlSeg = urlSegments[i]
+          if (
+            urlSeg &&
+            (caseSensitive
+              ? urlSeg.value === seg.value
+              : urlSeg.value.toLowerCase() === seg.value.toLowerCase())
+          ) {
+            return acc + 1
+          }
+        }
+        return acc
+      }, 0)
+
+    const aScore = score(aSegments)
+    const bScore = score(bSegments)
+
+    if (aScore !== bScore) return bScore - aScore
+
+    // Fall back to precomputed route rank
+    return (a.route.rank ?? 0) - (b.route.rank ?? 0)
+  })[0]
+
+  if (bestRoute) {

+    routeParams = bestRoute.params
   }

1→import { last } from './utils'
     2→import type { MatchLocation } from './RouterProvider'
     3→import type { AnyPathParams } from './route'
     4→
     5→export interface Segment {
     6→  type: 'pathname' | 'param' | 'wildcard' | 'optional-param'
     7→  value: string
     8→  prefixSegment?: string
     9→  suffixSegment?: string
    10→}
    11→
    12→export function joinPaths(paths: Array<string | undefined>) {
    13→  return cleanPath(
    14→    paths
    15→      .filter((val) => {
    16→        return val !== undefined
    17→      })
    18→      .join('/'),
    19→  )
    20→}
    21→
    22→export function cleanPath(path: string) {
    23→  // remove double slashes
    24→  return path.replace(/\/{2,}/g, '/')
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function trimPathLeft(path: string) {
    28→  return path === '/' ? path : path.replace(/^\/{1,}/, '')
    29→}
    30→
    31→export function trimPathRight(path: string) {
    32→  return path === '/' ? path : path.replace(/\/{1,}$/, '')
    33→}
    34→
    35→export function trimPath(path: string) {
    36→  return trimPathRight(trimPathLeft(path))
    37→}
    38→
    39→export function removeTrailingSlash(value: string, basepath: string): string {
    40→  if (value?.endsWith('/') && value !== '/' && value !== `${basepath}/`) {
    41→    return value.slice(0, -1)
    42→  }
    43→  return value
    44→}
    45→
    46→// intended to only compare path name
    47→// see the usage in the isActive under useLinkProps
    48→// /sample/path1 = /sample/path1/
    49→// /sample/path1/some <> /sample/path1
    50→export function exactPathTest(
    51→  pathName1: string,
    52→  pathName2: string,
    53→  basepath: string,
    54→): boolean {
    55→  return (
    56→    removeTrailingSlash(pathName1, basepath) ===
    57→    removeTrailingSlash(pathName2, basepath)
    58→  )
    59→}
    60→
    61→// When resolving relative paths, we treat all paths as if they are trailing slash
    62→// documents. All trailing slashes are removed after the path is resolved.
    63→// Here are a few examples:
    64→//
    65→// /a/b/c + ./d = /a/b/c/d
    66→// /a/b/c + ../d = /a/b/d
    67→// /a/b/c + ./d/ = /a/b/c/d
    68→// /a/b/c + ../d/ = /a/b/d
    69→// /a/b/c + ./ = /a/b/c
    70→//
    71→// Absolute paths that start with `/` short circuit the resolution process to the root
    72→// path.
    73→//
    74→// Here are some examples:
    75→//
    76→// /a/b/c + /d = /d
    77→// /a/b/c + /d/ = /d
    78→// /a/b/c + / = /
    79→//
    80→// Non-.-prefixed paths are still treated as relative paths, resolved like `./`
    81→//
    82→// Here are some examples:
    83→//
    84→// /a/b/c + d = /a/b/c/d
    85→// /a/b/c + d/ = /a/b/c/d
    86→// /a/b/c + d/e = /a/b/c/d/e
    87→interface ResolvePathOptions {
    88→  basepath: string
    89→  base: string
    90→  to: string
    91→  trailingSlash?: 'always' | 'never' | 'preserve'
    92→  caseSensitive?: boolean
    93→}
    94→
    95→export function resolvePath({
    96→  basepath,
    97→  base,
    98→  to,
    99→  trailingSlash = 'never',
   100→  caseSensitive,
   101→}: ResolvePathOptions) {
   102→  base = removeBasepath(basepath, base, caseSensitive)
   103→  to = removeBasepath(basepath, to, caseSensitive)
   104→
   105→  let baseSegments = parsePathname(base)
   106→  const toSegments = parsePathname(to)
   107→
   108→  if (baseSegments.length > 1 && last(baseSegments)?.value === '/') {
   109→    baseSegments.pop()
   110→  }
   111→
   112→  toSegments.forEach((toSegment, index) => {
   113→    if (toSegment.value === '/') {
   114→      if (!index) {
   115→        // Leading slash
   116→        baseSegments = [toSegment]
   117→      } else if (index === toSegments.length - 1) {
   118→        // Trailing Slash
   119→        baseSegments.push(toSegment)
   120→      } else {
   121→        // ignore inter-slashes
   122→      }
   123→    } else if (toSegment.value === '..') {
   124→      baseSegments.pop()
   125→    } else if (toSegment.value === '.') {
   126→      // ignore
   127→    } else {
   128→      baseSegments.push(toSegment)
   129→    }
   130→  })
   131→
   132→  if (baseSegments.length > 1) {
   133→    if (last(baseSegments)?.value === '/') {
   134→      if (trailingSlash === 'never') {
   135→        baseSegments.pop()
   136→      }
   137→    } else if (trailingSlash === 'always') {
   138→      baseSegments.push({ type: 'pathname', value: '/' })
   139→    }
   140→  }
   141→
   142→  const segmentValues = baseSegments.map((segment) => {
   143→    if (segment.type === 'param') {
   144→      const param = segment.value.substring(1)
   145→      if (segment.prefixSegment && segment.suffixSegment) {
   146→        return `${segment.prefixSegment}{$${param}}${segment.suffixSegment}`
   147→      } else if (segment.prefixSegment) {
   148→        return `${segment.prefixSegment}{$${param}}`
   149→      } else if (segment.suffixSegment) {
   150→        return `{$${param}}${segment.suffixSegment}`
   151→      }
   152→    }
   153→    if (segment.type === 'optional-param') {
   154→      const param = segment.value.substring(1)
   155→      if (segment.prefixSegment && segment.suffixSegment) {
   156→        return `${segment.prefixSegment}{-$${param}}${segment.suffixSegment}`
   157→      } else if (segment.prefixSegment) {
   158→        return `${segment.prefixSegment}{-$${param}}`
   159→      } else if (segment.suffixSegment) {
   160→        return `{-$${param}}${segment.suffixSegment}`
   161→      }
   162→      return `{-$${param}}`
   163→    }
   164→
   165→    if (segment.type === 'wildcard') {
   166→      if (segment.prefixSegment && segment.suffixSegment) {
   167→        return `${segment.prefixSegment}{$}${segment.suffixSegment}`
   168→      } else if (segment.prefixSegment) {
   169→        return `${segment.prefixSegment}{$}`
   170→      } else if (segment.suffixSegment) {
   171→        return `{$}${segment.suffixSegment}`
   172→      }
   173→    }
   174→    return segment.value
   175→  })
   176→  const joined = joinPaths([basepath, ...segmentValues])
   177→  return cleanPath(joined)
   178→}
   179→
   180→const PARAM_RE = /^\$.{1,}$/ // $paramName
   181→const PARAM_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE = /^(.*?)\{(\$[a-zA-Z_$][a-zA-Z0-9_$]*)\}(.*)$/ // prefix{$paramName}suffix
   182→const OPTIONAL_PARAM_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE =
   183→  /^(.*?)\{-(\$[a-zA-Z_$][a-zA-Z0-9_$]*)\}(.*)$/ // prefix{-$paramName}suffix
   184→
   185→const WILDCARD_RE = /^\$$/ // $
   186→const WILDCARD_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE = /^(.*?)\{\$\}(.*)$/ // prefix{$}suffix
   187→
   188→/**
   189→ * Required: `/foo/$bar` ✅
   190→ * Prefix and Suffix: `/foo/prefix${bar}suffix` ✅
   191→ * Wildcard: `/foo/$` ✅
   192→ * Wildcard with Prefix and Suffix: `/foo/prefix{$}suffix` ✅
   193→ *
   194→ * Optional param: `/foo/{-$bar}`
   195→ * Optional param with Prefix and Suffix: `/foo/prefix{-$bar}suffix`
   196→
   197→ * Future:
   198→ * Optional named segment: `/foo/{bar}`
   199→ * Optional named segment with Prefix and Suffix: `/foo/prefix{-bar}suffix`
   200→ * Escape special characters:
   201→ * - `/foo/[$]` - Static route
   202→ * - `/foo/[$]{$foo} - Dynamic route with a static prefix of `$`
   203→ * - `/foo/{$foo}[$]` - Dynamic route with a static suffix of `$`
   204→ */
   205→export function parsePathname(pathname?: string): Array<Segment> {
   206→  if (!pathname) {
   207→    return []
   208→  }
   209→
   210→  pathname = cleanPath(pathname)
   211→
   212→  const segments: Array<Segment> = []
   213→
   214→  if (pathname.slice(0, 1) === '/') {
   215→    pathname = pathname.substring(1)
   216→    segments.push({
   217→      type: 'pathname',
   218→      value: '/',
   219→    })
   220→  }
   221→
   222→  if (!pathname) {
   223→    return segments
   224→  }
   225→
   226→  // Remove empty segments and '.' segments
   227→  const split = pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean)
   228→
   229→  segments.push(
   230→    ...split.map((part): Segment => {
   231→      // Check for wildcard with curly braces: prefix{$}suffix
   232→      const wildcardBracesMatch = part.match(WILDCARD_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE)
   233→      if (wildcardBracesMatch) {
   234→        const prefix = wildcardBracesMatch[1]
   235→        const suffix = wildcardBracesMatch[2]
   236→        return {
   237→          type: 'wildcard',
   238→          value: '$',
   239→          prefixSegment: prefix || undefined,
   240→          suffixSegment: suffix || undefined,
   241→        }
   242→      }
   243→
   244→      // Check for optional parameter format: prefix{-$paramName}suffix
   245→      const optionalParamBracesMatch = part.match(
   246→        OPTIONAL_PARAM_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE,
   247→      )
   248→      if (optionalParamBracesMatch) {
   249→        const prefix = optionalParamBracesMatch[1]
   250→        const paramName = optionalParamBracesMatch[2]!
   251→        const suffix = optionalParamBracesMatch[3]
   252→        return {
   253→          type: 'optional-param',
   254→          value: paramName, // Now just $paramName (no prefix)
   255→          prefixSegment: prefix || undefined,
   256→          suffixSegment: suffix || undefined,
   257→        }
   258→      }
   259→
   260→      // Check for the new parameter format: prefix{$paramName}suffix
   261→      const paramBracesMatch = part.match(PARAM_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE)
   262→      if (paramBracesMatch) {
   263→        const prefix = paramBracesMatch[1]
   264→        const paramName = paramBracesMatch[2]
   265→        const suffix = paramBracesMatch[3]
   266→        return {
   267→          type: 'param',
   268→          value: '' + paramName,
   269→          prefixSegment: prefix || undefined,
   270→          suffixSegment: suffix || undefined,
   271→        }
   272→      }
   273→
   274→      // Check for bare parameter format: $paramName (without curly braces)
   275→      if (PARAM_RE.test(part)) {
   276→        const paramName = part.substring(1)
   277→        return {
   278→          type: 'param',
   279→          value: '$' + paramName,
   280→          prefixSegment: undefined,
   281→          suffixSegment: undefined,
   282→        }
   283→      }
   284→
   285→      // Check for bare wildcard: $ (without curly braces)
   286→      if (WILDCARD_RE.test(part)) {
   287→        return {
   288→          type: 'wildcard',
   289→          value: '$',
   290→          prefixSegment: undefined,
   291→          suffixSegment: undefined,
   292→        }
   293→      }
   294→
   295→      // Handle regular pathname segment
   296→      return {
   297→        type: 'pathname',
   298→        value: part.includes('%25')
   299→          ? part
   300→              .split('%25')
   301→              .map((segment) => decodeURI(segment))
   302→              .join('%25')
   303→          : decodeURI(part),
   304→      }
   305→    }),
   306→  )
   307→
   308→  if (pathname.slice(-1) === '/') {
   309→    pathname = pathname.substring(1)
   310→    segments.push({
   311→      type: 'pathname',
   312→      value: '/',
   313→    })
   314→  }
   315→
   316→  return segments
   317→}
   318→
   319→interface InterpolatePathOptions {
   320→  path?: string
   321→  params: Record<string, unknown>
   322→  leaveWildcards?: boolean
   323→  leaveParams?: boolean
   324→  // Map of encoded chars to decoded chars (e.g. '%40' -> '@') that should remain decoded in path params
   325→  decodeCharMap?: Map<string, string>
   326→}
   327→
   328→type InterPolatePathResult = {
   329→  interpolatedPath: string
   330→  usedParams: Record<string, unknown>
   331→  isMissingParams: boolean // true if any params were not available when being looked up in the params object
   332→}
   333→export function interpolatePath({
   334→  path,
   335→  params,
   336→  leaveWildcards,
   337→  leaveParams,
   338→  decodeCharMap,
   339→}: InterpolatePathOptions): InterPolatePathResult {
   340→  const interpolatedPathSegments = parsePathname(path)
   341→
   342→  function encodeParam(key: string): any {
   343→    const value = params[key]
   344→    const isValueString = typeof value === 'string'
   345→
   346→    if (['*', '_splat'].includes(key)) {
   347→      // the splat/catch-all routes shouldn't have the '/' encoded out
   348→      return isValueString ? encodeURI(value) : value
   349→    } else {
   350→      return isValueString ? encodePathParam(value, decodeCharMap) : value
   351→    }
   352→  }
   353→
   354→  // Tracking if any params are missing in the `params` object
   355→  // when interpolating the path
   356→  let isMissingParams = false
   357→
   358→  const usedParams: Record<string, unknown> = {}
   359→  const interpolatedPath = joinPaths(
   360→    interpolatedPathSegments.map((segment) => {
   361→      if (segment.type === 'wildcard') {
   362→        usedParams._splat = params._splat
   363→        const segmentPrefix = segment.prefixSegment || ''
   364→        const segmentSuffix = segment.suffixSegment || ''
   365→
   366→        // Check if _splat parameter is missing
   367→        if (!('_splat' in params)) {
   368→          isMissingParams = true
   369→          // For missing splat parameters, just return the prefix and suffix without the wildcard
   370→          if (leaveWildcards) {
   371→            return `${segmentPrefix}${segment.value}${segmentSuffix}`
   372→          }
   373→          // If there is a prefix or suffix, return them joined, otherwise omit the segment
   374→          if (segmentPrefix || segmentSuffix) {
   375→            return `${segmentPrefix}${segmentSuffix}`
   376→          }
   377→          return undefined
   378→        }
   379→
   380→        const value = encodeParam('_splat')
   381→        if (leaveWildcards) {
   382→          return `${segmentPrefix}${segment.value}${value ?? ''}${segmentSuffix}`
   383→        }
   384→        return `${segmentPrefix}${value}${segmentSuffix}`
   385→      }
   386→
   387→      if (segment.type === 'param') {
   388→        const key = segment.value.substring(1)
   389→        if (!isMissingParams && !(key in params)) {
   390→          isMissingParams = true
   391→        }
   392→        usedParams[key] = params[key]
   393→
   394→        const segmentPrefix = segment.prefixSegment || ''
   395→        const segmentSuffix = segment.suffixSegment || ''
   396→        if (leaveParams) {
   397→          const value = encodeParam(segment.value)
   398→          return `${segmentPrefix}${segment.value}${value ?? ''}${segmentSuffix}`
   399→        }
   400→        return `${segmentPrefix}${encodeParam(key) ?? 'undefined'}${segmentSuffix}`
   401→      }
   402→
   403→      if (segment.type === 'optional-param') {
   404→        const key = segment.value.substring(1)
   405→
   406→        const segmentPrefix = segment.prefixSegment || ''
   407→        const segmentSuffix = segment.suffixSegment || ''
   408→
   409→        // Check if optional parameter is missing or undefined
   410→        if (!(key in params) || params[key] == null) {
   411→          // For optional params with prefix/suffix, keep the prefix/suffix but omit the param
   412→          if (segmentPrefix || segmentSuffix) {
   413→            return `${segmentPrefix}${segmentSuffix}`
   414→          }
   415→          // If no prefix/suffix, omit the entire segment
   416→          return undefined
   417→        }
   418→
   419→        usedParams[key] = params[key]
   420→
   421→        if (leaveParams) {
   422→          const value = encodeParam(segment.value)
   423→          return `${segmentPrefix}${segment.value}${value ?? ''}${segmentSuffix}`
   424→        }
   425→        return `${segmentPrefix}${encodeParam(key) ?? ''}${segmentSuffix}`
   426→      }
   427→
   428→      return segment.value
   429→    }),
   430→  )
   431→  return { usedParams, interpolatedPath, isMissingParams }
   432→}
   433→
   434→function encodePathParam(value: string, decodeCharMap?: Map<string, string>) {
   435→  let encoded = encodeURIComponent(value)
   436→  if (decodeCharMap) {
   437→    for (const [encodedChar, char] of decodeCharMap) {
   438→      encoded = encoded.replaceAll(encodedChar, char)
   439→    }
   440→  }
   441→  return encoded
   442→}
   443→
   444→export function matchPathname(
   445→  basepath: string,
   446→  currentPathname: string,
   447→  matchLocation: Pick<MatchLocation, 'to' | 'fuzzy' | 'caseSensitive'>,
   448→): AnyPathParams | undefined {
   449→  const pathParams = matchByPath(basepath, currentPathname, matchLocation)
   450→  // const searchMatched = matchBySearch(location.search, matchLocation)
   451→
   452→  if (matchLocation.to && !pathParams) {
   453→    return
   454→  }
   455→
   456→  return pathParams ?? {}
   457→}
   458→
   459→export function removeBasepath(
   460→  basepath: string,
   461→  pathname: string,
   462→  caseSensitive: boolean = false,
   463→) {
   464→  // normalize basepath and pathname for case-insensitive comparison if needed
   465→  const normalizedBasepath = caseSensitive ? basepath : basepath.toLowerCase()
   466→  const normalizedPathname = caseSensitive ? pathname : pathname.toLowerCase()
   467→
   468→  switch (true) {
   469→    // default behaviour is to serve app from the root - pathname
   470→    // left untouched
   471→    case normalizedBasepath === '/':
   472→      return pathname
   473→
   474→    // shortcut for removing the basepath if it matches the pathname
   475→    case normalizedPathname === normalizedBasepath:
   476→      return ''
   477→
   478→    // in case pathname is shorter than basepath - there is
   479→    // nothing to remove
   480→    case pathname.length < basepath.length:
   481→      return pathname
   482→
   483→    // avoid matching partial segments - strict equality handled
   484→    // earlier, otherwise, basepath separated from pathname with
   485→    // separator, therefore lack of separator means partial
   486→    // segment match (`/app` should not match `/application`)
   487→    case normalizedPathname[normalizedBasepath.length] !== '/':
   488→      return pathname
   489→
   490→    // remove the basepath from the pathname if it starts with it
   491→    case normalizedPathname.startsWith(normalizedBasepath):
   492→      return pathname.slice(basepath.length)
   493→
   494→    // otherwise, return the pathname as is
   495→    default:
   496→      return pathname
   497→  }
   498→}
   499→
   500→export function matchByPath(
   501→  basepath: string,
   502→  from: string,
   503→  matchLocation: Pick<MatchLocation, 'to' | 'caseSensitive' | 'fuzzy'>,
   504→): Record<string, string> | undefined {
   505→  // check basepath first
   506→  if (basepath !== '/' && !from.startsWith(basepath)) {
   507→    return undefined
   508→  }
   509→  // Remove the base path from the pathname
   510→  from = removeBasepath(basepath, from, matchLocation.caseSensitive)
   511→  // Default to to $ (wildcard)
   512→  const to = removeBasepath(
   513→    basepath,
   514→    `${matchLocation.to ?? '$'}`,
   515→    matchLocation.caseSensitive,
   516→  )
   517→
   518→  // Parse the from and to
   519→  const baseSegments = parsePathname(from)
   520→  const routeSegments = parsePathname(to)
   521→
   522→  if (!from.startsWith('/')) {
   523→    baseSegments.unshift({
   524→      type: 'pathname',
   525→      value: '/',
   526→    })
   527→  }
   528→
   529→  if (!to.startsWith('/')) {
   530→    routeSegments.unshift({
   531→      type: 'pathname',
   532→      value: '/',
   533→    })
   534→  }
   535→
   536→  const params: Record<string, string> = {}
   537→
   538→  const isMatch = (() => {
   539→    let baseIndex = 0
   540→    let routeIndex = 0
   541→
   542→    while (
   543→      baseIndex < baseSegments.length ||
   544→      routeIndex < routeSegments.length
   545→    ) {
   546→      const baseSegment = baseSegments[baseIndex]
   547→      const routeSegment = routeSegments[routeIndex]
   548→
   549→      const isLastBaseSegment = baseIndex >= baseSegments.length - 1
   550→      const isLastRouteSegment = routeIndex >= routeSegments.length - 1
   551→
   552→      if (routeSegment) {
   553→        if (routeSegment.type === 'wildcard') {
   554→          // Capture all remaining segments for a wildcard
   555→          const remainingBaseSegments = baseSegments.slice(baseIndex)
   556→
   557→          let _splat: string
   558→
   559→          // If this is a wildcard with prefix/suffix, we need to handle the first segment specially
   560          if (routeSegment.prefixSegment || routeSegment.suffixSegment) {
   561→            if (!baseSegment) return false
   562→
   563→            const prefix = routeSegment.prefixSegment || ''
   564→            const suffix = routeSegment.suffixSegment || ''
   565→
   566→            // Check if the base segment starts with prefix and ends with suffix
   567→            const baseValue = baseSegment.value
   568→            if ('prefixSegment' in routeSegment) {
   569→              if (!baseValue.startsWith(prefix)) {
   570→                return false
   571→              }
   572→            }
   573→            if ('suffixSegment' in routeSegment) {
   574→              if (
   575→                !baseSegments[baseSegments.length - 1]?.value.endsWith(suffix)
   576→              ) {
   577→                return false
   578→              }
   579→            }
   580→
   581→            let rejoinedSplat = decodeURI(
   582→              joinPaths(remainingBaseSegments.map((d) => d.value)),
   583→            )
   584→
   585→            // Remove the prefix and suffix from the rejoined splat
   586→            if (prefix && rejoinedSplat.startsWith(prefix)) {
   587→              rejoinedSplat = rejoinedSplat.slice(prefix.length)
   588→            }
   589→
   590→            if (suffix && rejoinedSplat.endsWith(suffix)) {
   591→              rejoinedSplat = rejoinedSplat.slice(
   592→                0,
   593→                rejoinedSplat.length - suffix.length,
   594→              )
   595→            }
   596→
   597→            _splat = rejoinedSplat
   598→          } else {
   599→            // If no prefix/suffix, just rejoin the remaining segments
   600→            _splat = decodeURI(
   601→              joinPaths(remainingBaseSegments.map((d) => d.value)),
   602→            )
   603→          }
   604→
   605→          // TODO: Deprecate *
   606→          params['*'] = _splat
   607→          params['_splat'] = _splat
   608→          return true
   609→        }
   610→
   611→        if (routeSegment.type === 'pathname') {
   612→          if (routeSegment.value === '/' && !baseSegment?.value) {
   613→            routeIndex++
   614→            continue
   615→          }
   616→
   617→          if (baseSegment) {
   618→            if (matchLocation.caseSensitive) {
   619→              if (routeSegment.value !== baseSegment.value) {
   620→                return false
   621→              }
   622→            } else if (
   623→              routeSegment.value.toLowerCase() !==
   624→              baseSegment.value.toLowerCase()
   625→            ) {
   626→              return false
   627→            }
   628→            baseIndex++
   629→            routeIndex++
   630→            continue
   631→          } else {
   632→            return false
   633→          }
   634→        }
   635→
   636→        if (routeSegment.type === 'param') {
   637→          if (!baseSegment) {
   638→            return false
   639→          }
   640→
   641→          if (baseSegment.value === '/') {
   642→            return false
   643→          }
   644→
   645→          let _paramValue = ''
   646→          let matched = false
   647→
   648→          // If this param has prefix/suffix, we need to extract the actual parameter value
   649→          if (routeSegment.prefixSegment || routeSegment.suffixSegment) {
   650→            const prefix = routeSegment.prefixSegment || ''
   651→            const suffix = routeSegment.suffixSegment || ''
   652→
   653→            // Check if the base segment starts with prefix and ends with suffix
   654→            const baseValue = baseSegment.value
   655→            if (prefix && !baseValue.startsWith(prefix)) {
   656→              return false
   657→            }
   658→            if (suffix && !baseValue.endsWith(suffix)) {
   659→              return false
   660→            }
   661→
   662→            let paramValue = baseValue
   663→            if (prefix && paramValue.startsWith(prefix)) {
   664→              paramValue = paramValue.slice(prefix.length)
   665→            }
   666→            if (suffix && paramValue.endsWith(suffix)) {
   667→              paramValue = paramValue.slice(
   668→                0,
   669→                paramValue.length - suffix.length,
   670→              )
   671→            }
   672→
   673→            _paramValue = decodeURIComponent(paramValue)
   674→            matched = true
   675→          } else {
   676→            // If no prefix/suffix, just decode the base segment value
   677→            _paramValue = decodeURIComponent(baseSegment.value)
   678→            matched = true
   679→          }
   680→
   681→          if (matched) {
   682→            params[routeSegment.value.substring(1)] = _paramValue
   683→            baseIndex++
   684→          }
   685→
   686→          routeIndex++
   687→          continue
   688→        }
   689→
   690→        if (routeSegment.type === 'optional-param') {
   691→          // Optional parameters can be missing - don't fail the match
   692→          if (!baseSegment) {
   693→            // No base segment for optional param - skip this route segment
   694→            routeIndex++
   695→            continue
   696→          }
   697→
   698→          if (baseSegment.value === '/') {
   699→            // Skip slash segments for optional params
   700→            routeIndex++
   701→            continue
   702→          }
   703→
   704→          let _paramValue = ''
   705→          let matched = false
   706→
   707→          // If this optional param has prefix/suffix, we need to extract the actual parameter value
   708→          if (routeSegment.prefixSegment || routeSegment.suffixSegment) {
   709→            const prefix = routeSegment.prefixSegment || ''
   710→            const suffix = routeSegment.suffixSegment || ''
   711→
   712→            // Check if the base segment starts with prefix and ends with suffix
   713→            const baseValue = baseSegment.value
   714→            if (
   715→              (!prefix || baseValue.startsWith(prefix)) &&
   716→              (!suffix || baseValue.endsWith(suffix))
   717→            ) {
   718→              let paramValue = baseValue
   719→              if (prefix && paramValue.startsWith(prefix)) {
   720→                paramValue = paramValue.slice(prefix.length)
   721→              }
   722→              if (suffix && paramValue.endsWith(suffix)) {
   723→                paramValue = paramValue.slice(
   724→                  0,
   725→                  paramValue.length - suffix.length,
   726→                )
   727→              }
   728→
   729→              _paramValue = decodeURIComponent(paramValue)
   730→              matched = true
   731→            }
   732→          } else {
   733→            // For optional params without prefix/suffix, we need to check if the current
   734→            // base segment should match this optional param or a later route segment
   735→
   736→            // Look ahead to see if there's a later route segment that matches the current base segment
   737→            let shouldMatchOptional = true
   738→            for (
   739→              let lookAhead = routeIndex + 1;
   740→              lookAhead < routeSegments.length;
   741→              lookAhead++
   742→            ) {
   743→              const futureRouteSegment = routeSegments[lookAhead]
   744→              if (
   745→                futureRouteSegment?.type === 'pathname' &&
   746→                futureRouteSegment.value === baseSegment.value
   747→              ) {
   748→                // The current base segment matches a future pathname segment,
   749→                // so we should skip this optional parameter
   750→                shouldMatchOptional = false
   751→                break
   752→              }
   753→
   754→              // If we encounter a required param or wildcard, stop looking ahead
   755→              if (
   756→                futureRouteSegment?.type === 'param' ||
   757→                futureRouteSegment?.type === 'wildcard'
   758→              ) {
   759→                break
   760→              }
   761→            }
   762→
   763→            if (shouldMatchOptional) {
   764→              // If no prefix/suffix, just decode the base segment value
   765→              _paramValue = decodeURIComponent(baseSegment.value)
   766→              matched = true
   767→            }
   768→          }
   769→
   770→          if (matched) {
   771→            params[routeSegment.value.substring(1)] = _paramValue
   772→            baseIndex++
   773→          }
   774→
   775→          routeIndex++
   776→          continue
   777→        }
   778→      }
   779→
   780→      if (!isLastBaseSegment && isLastRouteSegment) {
   781→        params['**'] = joinPaths(
   782→          baseSegments.slice(baseIndex + 1).map((d) => d.value),
   783→        )
   784→        return !!matchLocation.fuzzy && routeSegment?.value !== '/'
   785→      }
   786→
   787→      // If we have base segments left but no route segments, it's not a match
   788→      if (
   789→        baseIndex < baseSegments.length &&
   790→        routeIndex >= routeSegments.length
   791→      ) {
   792→        return false
   793→      }
   794→
   795→      // If we have route segments left but no base segments, check if remaining are optional
   796→      if (
   797→        routeIndex < routeSegments.length &&
   798→        baseIndex >= baseSegments.length
   799→      ) {
   800→        // Check if all remaining route segments are optional
   801→        for (let i = routeIndex; i < routeSegments.length; i++) {
   802→          if (routeSegments[i]?.type !== 'optional-param') {
   803→            return false
   804→          }
   805→        }
   806→        // All remaining are optional, so we can finish
   807→        break
   808→      }
   809→
   810→      break
   811→    }
   812→
   813→    return true
   814→  })()
   815→
   816→  return isMatch ? params : undefined
   817→}

   677→export interface ViewTransitionOptions {

   679→    | Array<string>

   689→export function defaultSerializeError(err: unknown) {
   690→  if (err instanceof Error) {
   691→    const obj = {
   692→      name: err.name,
   693→      message: err.message,
   694→    }
   695→
   696→    if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') {
   697→      ;(obj as any).stack = err.stack
   698→    }
   699→
   700→    return obj
   701→  }
   702→
   703→  return {
   704→    data: err,
   705→  }
   706→}
   707→
   708→export type TrailingSlashOption = 'always' | 'never' | 'preserve'
   709→
   710→export function getLocationChangeInfo(routerState: {
   711→  resolvedLocation?: ParsedLocation
   712→  location: ParsedLocation
   713→}) {
   714→  const fromLocation = routerState.resolvedLocation
   715→  const toLocation = routerState.location
   716→  const pathChanged = fromLocation?.pathname !== toLocation.pathname
   717→  const hrefChanged = fromLocation?.href !== toLocation.href
   718→  const hashChanged = fromLocation?.hash !== toLocation.hash
   719→  return { fromLocation, toLocation, pathChanged, hrefChanged, hashChanged }
   720→}

   722→export type CreateRouterFn = <

   727→  TDehydrated extends Record<string, any> = Record<string, any>,
   728→>(
   729→  options: undefined extends number
   730→    ? 'strictNullChecks must be enabled in tsconfig.json'
   731→    : RouterConstructorOptions<
   732→        TRouteTree,
   733→        TTrailingSlashOption,
   734→        TDefaultStructuralSharingOption,
   735→        TRouterHistory,

   737→      >,
   738→) => RouterCore<

   745→
   746→export class RouterCore<

   842→    }

   915→  get state() {

   919→  buildRouteTree = () => {

   943→  subscribe: SubscribeFn = (eventType, fn) => {

   946→      fn,

   954→  }

   956→  emit: EmitFn = (routerEvent) => {

   964→  parseLocation: ParseLocationFn<TRouteTree> = (

   969→      pathname,
   970→      search,
   971→      hash,
   972→      state,
   973→    }: HistoryLocation): ParsedLocation<FullSearchSchema<TRouteTree>> => {
   974→      const parsedSearch = this.options.parseSearch(search)
   975→      const searchStr = this.options.stringifySearch(parsedSearch)
   976→

   978→        pathname,
   979→        searchStr,
   980→        search: replaceEqualDeep(previousLocation?.search, parsedSearch) as any,
   981→        hash: hash.split('#').reverse()[0] ?? '',
   982→        href: `${pathname}${searchStr}${hash}`,
   983→        state: replaceEqualDeep(previousLocation?.state, state),

  1000→        ...parsedTempLocation,
  1001→        maskedLocation: location,
  1002→      }
  1003→    }
  1004→
  1005→    return location
  1006→  }
  1007→
  1008→  resolvePathWithBase = (from: string, path: string) => {

  1011→      base: from,
  1012→      to: cleanPath(path),

  1014→      caseSensitive: this.options.caseSensitive,
  1015→    })

  1017→  }

  1019→  get looseRoutesById() {

  1023→  /**

  1040→          pathname: pathnameOrNext,

  1042→        } as ParsedLocation,

  1050→  private matchRoutesInternal(

  1102→          const parsedParams = parseParams(routeParams)

  1105→        } catch (err: any) {

  1107→            cause: err,
  1108→          })

  1112→          }
  1113→
  1114→          return parsedParamsError

  1120→
  1121→    const matches: Array<AnyRouteMatch> = []
  1122→
  1123→    const getParentContext = (parentMatch?: AnyRouteMatch) => {
  1124→      const parentMatchId = parentMatch?.id

  1138      // pass the search params to the route's potential key function

  1160→              ...strictSearch,

  1230→          _strictParams: usedParams,

  1247→          index,
  1248→          routeId: route.id,

  1252→          _strictParams: usedParams,
  1253→          pathname: joinPaths([this.basepath, interpolatedPath]),
  1254→          updatedAt: Date.now(),
  1255→          search: previousMatch

  1258→          _strictSearch: strictMatchSearch,

  1261→          isFetching: false,

  1263→          paramsError: parseErrors[index],

  1265→          __beforeLoadContext: undefined,

  1277→          headScripts: undefined,

  1342→
  1343→  getMatchedRoutes: GetMatchRoutesFn = (

  1373→  cancelMatches = () => {

  1375→      this.cancelMatch(match.id)
  1376→    })
  1377→  }
  1378→
  1379→  private comparePaths(path1: string, path2: string) {
  1380→    return path1.replace(/(.+)\/$/, '$1') === path2.replace(/(.+)\/$/, '$1')
  1381→  }
  1382→
  1383→  buildLocation: BuildLocationFn = (opts) => {
  1384→    const build = (
  1385→      dest: BuildNextOptions & {
  1386→        unmaskOnReload?: boolean
  1387→      } = {},
  1388→    ): ParsedLocation => {
  1389→      // We allow the caller to override the current location
  1390→      const currentLocation = dest._fromLocation || this.latestLocation
  1391→
  1392→      const allCurrentLocationMatches = this.matchRoutes(currentLocation, {
  1393→        _buildLocation: true,
  1394→      })
  1395→
  1396→      const lastMatch = last(allCurrentLocationMatches)!
  1397→
  1398→      // First let's find the starting pathname
  1399→      // By default, start with the current location
  1400→      let fromPath = lastMatch.fullPath
  1401→      const toPath = dest.to
  1402→        ? this.resolvePathWithBase(fromPath, `${dest.to}`)
  1403→        : this.resolvePathWithBase(fromPath, '.')
  1404→
  1405→      const routeIsChanging =
  1406→        !!dest.to &&
  1407→        !this.comparePaths(dest.to.toString(), fromPath) &&
  1408→        !this.comparePaths(toPath, fromPath)
  1409→
  1410→      // If the route is changing we need to find the relative fromPath
  1411→      if (dest.unsafeRelative === 'path') {
  1412→        fromPath = currentLocation.pathname
  1413→      } else if (routeIsChanging && dest.from) {
  1414→        fromPath = dest.from
  1415→
  1416→        // do this check only on navigations during test or development
  1417→        if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' && dest._isNavigate) {
  1418→          const allFromMatches = this.getMatchedRoutes(
  1419→            dest.from,
  1420→            undefined,
  1421→          ).matchedRoutes
  1422→
  1423→          const matchedFrom = [...allCurrentLocationMatches]
  1424→            .reverse()
  1425→            .find((d) => {
  1426→              return this.comparePaths(d.fullPath, fromPath)
  1427→            })
  1428→
  1429→          const matchedCurrent = [...allFromMatches].reverse().find((d) => {
  1430→            return this.comparePaths(d.fullPath, currentLocation.pathname)
  1431→          })
  1432→
  1433→          // for from to be invalid it shouldn't just be unmatched to currentLocation
  1434→          // but the currentLocation should also be unmatched to from
  1435→          if (!matchedFrom && !matchedCurrent) {
  1436→            console.warn(`Could not find match for from: ${fromPath}`)
  1437→          }
  1438→        }
  1439→      }
  1440→
  1441→      // From search should always use the current location
  1442→      const fromSearch = lastMatch.search
  1443→      // Same with params. It can't hurt to provide as many as possible
  1444→      const fromParams = { ...lastMatch.params }
  1445→
  1446→      // Resolve the next to
  1447→      const nextTo = dest.to
  1448→        ? this.resolvePathWithBase(fromPath, `${dest.to}`)
  1449→        : this.resolvePathWithBase(fromPath, '.')
  1450→
  1451→      // Resolve the next params
  1452→      let nextParams =
  1453→        dest.params === false || dest.params === null
  1454→          ? {}
  1455→          : (dest.params ?? true) === true
  1456→            ? fromParams
  1457→            : {
  1458→                ...fromParams,
  1459→                ...functionalUpdate(dest.params as any, fromParams),
  1460→              }
  1461→
  1462→      // Interpolate the path first to get the actual resolved path, then match against that
  1463→      const interpolatedNextTo = interpolatePath({
  1464→        path: nextTo,
  1465→        params: nextParams ?? {},
  1466→      }).interpolatedPath
  1467→
  1468→      const destRoutes = this.matchRoutes(
  1469→        interpolatedNextTo,
  1470→        {},
  1471→        {
  1472→          _buildLocation: true,
  1473→        },
  1474→      ).map((d) => this.looseRoutesById[d.routeId]!)
  1475→
  1476→      // If there are any params, we need to stringify them
  1477→      if (Object.keys(nextParams).length > 0) {
  1478→        destRoutes
  1479→          .map((route) => {
  1480→            return (
  1481→              route.options.params?.stringify ?? route.options.stringifyParams
  1482→            )
  1483→          })
  1484→          .filter(Boolean)
  1485→          .forEach((fn) => {
  1486→            nextParams = { ...nextParams!, ...fn!(nextParams) }
  1487→          })
  1488→      }
  1489→
  1490→      const nextPathname = interpolatePath({
  1491→        // Use the original template path for interpolation
  1492→        // This preserves the original parameter syntax including optional parameters
  1493→        path: nextTo,
  1494→        params: nextParams ?? {},
  1495→        leaveWildcards: false,
  1496→        leaveParams: opts.leaveParams,
  1497→        decodeCharMap: this.pathParamsDecodeCharMap,
  1498→      }).interpolatedPath
  1499→
  1500→      // Resolve the next search
  1501→      let nextSearch = fromSearch
  1502→      if (opts._includeValidateSearch && this.options.search?.strict) {
  1503→        let validatedSearch = {}
  1504→        destRoutes.forEach((route) => {
  1505→          try {
  1506→            if (route.options.validateSearch) {
  1507→              validatedSearch = {
  1508→                ...validatedSearch,
  1509→                ...(validateSearch(route.options.validateSearch, {
  1510→                  ...validatedSearch,
  1511→                  ...nextSearch,
  1512→                }) ?? {}),
  1513→              }
  1514→            }
  1515→          } catch {
  1516→            // ignore errors here because they are already handled in matchRoutes
  1517→          }
  1518→        })
  1519→        nextSearch = validatedSearch
  1520→      }
  1521→
  1522→      nextSearch = applySearchMiddleware({
  1523→        search: nextSearch,
  1524→        dest,
  1525→        destRoutes,
  1526→        _includeValidateSearch: opts._includeValidateSearch,
  1527→      })
  1528→
  1529→      // Replace the equal deep
  1530→      nextSearch = replaceEqualDeep(fromSearch, nextSearch)
  1531→
  1532→      // Stringify the next search
  1533→      const searchStr = this.options.stringifySearch(nextSearch)
  1534→
  1535→      // Resolve the next hash
  1536→      const hash =
  1537→        dest.hash === true
  1538→          ? currentLocation.hash
  1539→          : dest.hash
  1540→            ? functionalUpdate(dest.hash, currentLocation.hash)
  1541→            : undefined
  1542→
  1543→      // Resolve the next hash string
  1544→      const hashStr = hash ? `#${hash}` : ''
  1545→
  1546→      // Resolve the next state
  1547→      let nextState =
  1548→        dest.state === true
  1549→          ? currentLocation.state
  1550→          : dest.state
  1551→            ? functionalUpdate(dest.state, currentLocation.state)
  1552→            : {}
  1553→
  1554→      // Replace the equal deep
  1555→      nextState = replaceEqualDeep(currentLocation.state, nextState)
  1556→
  1557→      // Return the next location
  1558→      return {
  1559→        pathname: nextPathname,
  1560→        search: nextSearch,
  1561→        searchStr,
  1562→        state: nextState as any,
  1563→        hash: hash ?? '',
  1564→        href: `${nextPathname}${searchStr}${hashStr}`,
  1565→        unmaskOnReload: dest.unmaskOnReload,
  1566→      }
  1567→    }
  1568→
  1569→    const buildWithMatches = (
  1570→      dest: BuildNextOptions = {},
  1571→      maskedDest?: BuildNextOptions,
  1572→    ) => {
  1573→      const next = build(dest)
  1574→
  1575→      let maskedNext = maskedDest ? build(maskedDest) : undefined
  1576→
  1577→      if (!maskedNext) {
  1578→        let params = {}
  1579→
  1580→        const foundMask = this.options.routeMasks?.find((d) => {
  1581→          const match = matchPathname(this.basepath, next.pathname, {
  1582→            to: d.from,
  1583→            caseSensitive: false,
  1584→            fuzzy: false,
  1585→          })
  1586→
  1587→          if (match) {
  1588→            params = match
  1589→            return true
  1590→          }
  1591→
  1592→          return false
  1593→        })
  1594→
  1595→        if (foundMask) {
  1596→          const { from: _from, ...maskProps } = foundMask
  1597→          maskedDest = {
  1598→            ...pick(opts, ['from']),
  1599→            ...maskProps,
  1600→            params,
  1601→          }
  1602→          maskedNext = build(maskedDest)
  1603→        }
  1604→      }
  1605→
  1606→      if (maskedNext) {
  1607→        const maskedFinal = build(maskedDest)
  1608→        next.maskedLocation = maskedFinal
  1609→      }
  1610→
  1611→      return next
  1612→    }
  1613→
  1614→    if (opts.mask) {
  1615→      return buildWithMatches(opts, {
  1616→        ...pick(opts, ['from']),
  1617→        ...opts.mask,
  1618→      })
  1619→    }
  1620→
  1621→    return buildWithMatches(opts)
  1622→  }
  1623→
  1624→  commitLocationPromise: undefined | ControlledPromise<void>
  1625→
  1626→  commitLocation: CommitLocationFn = ({
  1627→    viewTransition,
  1628→    ignoreBlocker,
  1629→    ...next
  1630→  }) => {
  1631→    const isSameState = () => {
  1632→      // the following props are ignored but may still be provided when navigating,
  1633→      // temporarily add the previous values to the next state so they don't affect
  1634→      // the comparison
  1635→      const ignoredProps = [
  1636→        'key', // TODO: Remove in v2 - use __TSR_key instead
  1637→        '__TSR_key',
  1638→        '__TSR_index',
  1639→        '__hashScrollIntoViewOptions',
  1640→      ] as const
  1641→      ignoredProps.forEach((prop) => {
  1642→        ;(next.state as any)[prop] = this.latestLocation.state[prop]
  1643→      })
  1644→      const isEqual = deepEqual(next.state, this.latestLocation.state)
  1645→      ignoredProps.forEach((prop) => {
  1646→        delete next.state[prop]
  1647→      })
  1648→      return isEqual
  1649→    }
  1650→
  1651→    const isSameUrl = this.latestLocation.href === next.href
  1652→
  1653→    const previousCommitPromise = this.commitLocationPromise
  1654→    this.commitLocationPromise = createControlledPromise<void>(() => {
  1655→      previousCommitPromise?.resolve()
  1656→    })
  1657→
  1658→    // Don't commit to history if nothing changed
  1659→    if (isSameUrl && isSameState()) {

  1661→    } else {
  1662→      // eslint-disable-next-line prefer-const
  1663→      let { maskedLocation, hashScrollIntoView, ...nextHistory } = next
  1664→
  1665→      if (maskedLocation) {
  1666→        nextHistory = {
  1667→          ...maskedLocation,
  1668→          state: {
  1669→            ...maskedLocation.state,
  1670→            __tempKey: undefined,
  1671→            __tempLocation: {
  1672→              ...nextHistory,
  1673→              search: nextHistory.searchStr,
  1674→              state: {
  1675→                ...nextHistory.state,
  1676→                __tempKey: undefined!,
  1677→                __tempLocation: undefined!,
  1678→                __TSR_key: undefined!,
  1679→                key: undefined!, // TODO: Remove in v2 - use __TSR_key instead
  1680→              },
  1681→            },
  1682→          },
  1683→        }
  1684→
  1685→        if (
  1686→          nextHistory.unmaskOnReload ??
  1687→          this.options.unmaskOnReload ??
  1688→          false
  1689→        ) {
  1690→          nextHistory.state.__tempKey = this.tempLocationKey
  1691→        }
  1692→      }
  1693→
  1694→      nextHistory.state.__hashScrollIntoViewOptions =
  1695→        hashScrollIntoView ?? this.options.defaultHashScrollIntoView ?? true
  1696→

  1700→        nextHistory.href,
  1701→        nextHistory.state,
  1702→        { ignoreBlocker },
  1703→      )
  1704→    }
  1705→
  1706→    this.resetNextScroll = next.resetScroll ?? true
  1707→
  1708→    if (!this.history.subscribers.size) {
  1709→      this.load()
  1710→    }
  1711→
  1712→    return this.commitLocationPromise
  1713→  }
  1714→
  1715→  buildAndCommitLocation = ({
  1716→    replace,
  1717→    resetScroll,
  1718→    hashScrollIntoView,
  1719→    viewTransition,
  1720→    ignoreBlocker,
  1721→    href,
  1722→    ...rest
  1723→  }: BuildNextOptions & CommitLocationOptions = {}) => {
  1724→    if (href) {
  1725→      const currentIndex = this.history.location.state.__TSR_index
  1726→
  1727→      const parsed = parseHref(href, {
  1728→        __TSR_index: replace ? currentIndex : currentIndex + 1,
  1729→      })
  1730→      rest.to = parsed.pathname
  1731→      rest.search = this.options.parseSearch(parsed.search)
  1732→      // remove the leading `#` from the hash
  1733→      rest.hash = parsed.hash.slice(1)
  1734→    }
  1735→
  1736→    const location = this.buildLocation({
  1737→      ...(rest as any),
  1738→      _includeValidateSearch: true,
  1739→    })
  1740→
  1741→    return this.commitLocation({
  1742→      ...location,
  1743→      viewTransition,
  1744→      replace,
  1745→      resetScroll,
  1746→      hashScrollIntoView,
  1747→      ignoreBlocker,
  1748→    })
  1749→  }
  1750→
  1751→  navigate: NavigateFn = ({ to, reloadDocument, href, ...rest }) => {
  1752→    if (!reloadDocument && href) {
  1753→      try {
  1754→        new URL(`${href}`)
  1755→        reloadDocument = true
  1756→      } catch {}
  1757→    }
  1758→
  1759→    if (reloadDocument) {
  1760→      if (!href) {
  1761→        const location = this.buildLocation({ to, ...rest } as any)
  1762→        href = this.history.createHref(location.href)
  1763→      }

  1765→        window.location.replace(href)
  1766→      } else {
  1767→        window.location.href = href
  1768→      }
  1769→      return
  1770→    }
  1771→
  1772→    return this.buildAndCommitLocation({
  1773→      ...rest,
  1774→      href,
  1775→      to: to as string,
  1776→      _isNavigate: true,
  1777→    })
  1778→  }
  1779→
  1780→  latestLoadPromise: undefined | Promise<void>
  1781→
  1782→  beforeLoad = () => {
  1783→    // Cancel any pending matches
  1784→    this.cancelMatches()
  1785→    this.latestLocation = this.parseLocation(this.latestLocation)
  1786→
  1787→    if (this.isServer) {
  1788→      // for SPAs on the initial load, this is handled by the Transitioner
  1789→      const nextLocation = this.buildLocation({
  1790→        to: this.latestLocation.pathname,
  1791→        search: true,
  1792→        params: true,
  1793→        hash: true,
  1794→        state: true,
  1795→        _includeValidateSearch: true,
  1796→      })
  1797→
  1798→      // Normalize URLs for comparison to handle encoding differences
  1799→      // Browser history always stores encoded URLs while buildLocation may produce decoded URLs
  1800→      const normalizeUrl = (url: string) => {
  1801→        try {
  1802→          return encodeURI(decodeURI(url))
  1803→        } catch {
  1804→          return url
  1805→        }
  1806→      }
  1807→
  1808→      if (
  1809→        trimPath(normalizeUrl(this.latestLocation.href)) !==
  1810→        trimPath(normalizeUrl(nextLocation.href))
  1811→      ) {
  1812→        throw redirect({ href: nextLocation.href })
  1813→      }
  1814→    }
  1815→    // Match the routes
  1816→    const pendingMatches = this.matchRoutes(this.latestLocation)
  1817→
  1818→    // Ingest the new matches
  1819→    this.__store.setState((s) => ({
  1820→      ...s,
  1821→      status: 'pending',
  1822→      isLoading: true,
  1823→      location: this.latestLocation,
  1824→      pendingMatches,
  1825→      // If a cached moved to pendingMatches, remove it from cachedMatches
  1826→      cachedMatches: s.cachedMatches.filter(
  1827→        (d) => !pendingMatches.find((e) => e.id === d.id),
  1828→      ),
  1829→    }))
  1830→  }
  1831→
  1832→  load: LoadFn = async (opts?: { sync?: boolean }): Promise<void> => {
  1833→    let redirect: AnyRedirect | undefined
  1834→    let notFound: NotFoundError | undefined
  1835→    let loadPromise: Promise<void>
  1836→
  1837→    // eslint-disable-next-line prefer-const
  1838→    loadPromise = new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
  1839→      this.startTransition(async () => {
  1840→        try {
  1841→          this.beforeLoad()
  1842→          const next = this.latestLocation
  1843→          const prevLocation = this.state.resolvedLocation
  1844→
  1845→          if (!this.state.redirect) {
  1846→            this.emit({
  1847→              type: 'onBeforeNavigate',
  1848→              ...getLocationChangeInfo({
  1849→                resolvedLocation: prevLocation,
  1850→                location: next,
  1851→              }),
  1852→            })
  1853→          }
  1854→
  1855→          this.emit({
  1856→            type: 'onBeforeLoad',
  1857→            ...getLocationChangeInfo({
  1858→              resolvedLocation: prevLocation,
  1859→              location: next,
  1860→            }),
  1861→          })
  1862→
  1863→          await this.loadMatches({
  1864→            sync: opts?.sync,
  1865→            matches: this.state.pendingMatches as Array<AnyRouteMatch>,
  1866→            location: next,
  1867→            // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/require-await
  1868→            onReady: async () => {
  1869→              // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/require-await
  1870→              this.startViewTransition(async () => {
  1871→                // this.viewTransitionPromise = createControlledPromise<true>()
  1872→
  1873→                // Commit the pending matches. If a previous match was
  1874→                // removed, place it in the cachedMatches
  1875→                let exitingMatches!: Array<AnyRouteMatch>
  1876→                let enteringMatches!: Array<AnyRouteMatch>
  1877→                let stayingMatches!: Array<AnyRouteMatch>
  1878→
  1879→                batch(() => {
  1880→                  this.__store.setState((s) => {
  1881→                    const previousMatches = s.matches
  1882→                    const newMatches = s.pendingMatches || s.matches
  1883→
  1884→                    exitingMatches = previousMatches.filter(
  1885→                      (match) => !newMatches.find((d) => d.id === match.id),
  1886→                    )
  1887→                    enteringMatches = newMatches.filter(
  1888→                      (match) =>
  1889→                        !previousMatches.find((d) => d.id === match.id),
  1890→                    )
  1891→                    stayingMatches = previousMatches.filter((match) =>
  1892→                      newMatches.find((d) => d.id === match.id),
  1893→                    )
  1894→
  1895→                    return {
  1896→                      ...s,
  1897→                      isLoading: false,
  1898→                      loadedAt: Date.now(),
  1899→                      matches: newMatches,
  1900→                      pendingMatches: undefined,
  1901→                      cachedMatches: [
  1902→                        ...s.cachedMatches,
  1903→                        ...exitingMatches.filter((d) => d.status !== 'error'),
  1904→                      ],
  1905→                    }
  1906→                  })
  1907→                  this.clearExpiredCache()
  1908→                })
  1909→
  1910→                //
  1911→                ;(
  1912→                  [
  1913→                    [exitingMatches, 'onLeave'],
  1914→                    [enteringMatches, 'onEnter'],
  1915→                    [stayingMatches, 'onStay'],
  1916→                  ] as const
  1917→                ).forEach(([matches, hook]) => {
  1918→                  matches.forEach((match) => {
  1919→                    this.looseRoutesById[match.routeId]!.options[hook]?.(match)
  1920→                  })
  1921→                })
  1922→              })
  1923→            },
  1924→          })
  1925→        } catch (err) {
  1926→          if (isRedirect(err)) {
  1927→            redirect = err
  1928→            if (!this.isServer) {
  1929→              this.navigate({
  1930→                ...redirect.options,
  1931→                replace: true,
  1932→                ignoreBlocker: true,
  1933→              })
  1934→            }
  1935→          } else if (isNotFound(err)) {
  1936→            notFound = err
  1937→          }
  1938→
  1939→          this.__store.setState((s) => ({
  1940→            ...s,
  1941→            statusCode: redirect
  1942→              ? redirect.status
  1943→              : notFound
  1944→                ? 404
  1945→                : s.matches.some((d) => d.status === 'error')
  1946→                  ? 500
  1947→                  : 200,
  1948→            redirect,
  1949→          }))
  1950→        }
  1951→
  1952→        if (this.latestLoadPromise === loadPromise) {
  1953→          this.commitLocationPromise?.resolve()
  1954→          this.latestLoadPromise = undefined
  1955→          this.commitLocationPromise = undefined
  1956→        }
  1957→        resolve()
  1958→      })
  1959→    })
  1960→
  1961→    this.latestLoadPromise = loadPromise
  1962→
  1963→    await loadPromise
  1964→
  1965→    while (
  1966→      (this.latestLoadPromise as any) &&
  1967→      loadPromise !== this.latestLoadPromise
  1968→    ) {
  1969→      await this.latestLoadPromise
  1970→    }
  1971→
  1972→    if (this.hasNotFoundMatch()) {
  1973→      this.__store.setState((s) => ({
  1974→        ...s,
  1975→        statusCode: 404,
  1976→      }))
  1977→    }
  1978→  }
  1979→
  1980→  startViewTransition = (fn: () => Promise<void>) => {
  1981→    // Determine if we should start a view transition from the navigation
  1982→    // or from the router default
  1983→    const shouldViewTransition =
  1984→      this.shouldViewTransition ?? this.options.defaultViewTransition
  1985→
  1986→    // Reset the view transition flag
  1987→    delete this.shouldViewTransition
  1988→    // Attempt to start a view transition (or just apply the changes if we can't)
  1989→    if (
  1990→      shouldViewTransition &&
  1991→      typeof document !== 'undefined' &&
  1992→      'startViewTransition' in document &&
  1993→      typeof document.startViewTransition === 'function'
  1994→    ) {
  1995→      // lib.dom.ts doesn't support viewTransition types variant yet.
  1996→      // TODO: Fix this when dom types are updated
  1997→      let startViewTransitionParams: any
  1998→
  1999→      if (
  2000→        typeof shouldViewTransition === 'object' &&
  2001→        this.isViewTransitionTypesSupported
  2002→      ) {
  2003→        const next = this.latestLocation
  2004→        const prevLocation = this.state.resolvedLocation
  2005→
  2006→        const resolvedViewTransitionTypes =
  2007→          typeof shouldViewTransition.types === 'function'
  2008→            ? shouldViewTransition.types(
  2009→                getLocationChangeInfo({
  2010→                  resolvedLocation: prevLocation,
  2011→                  location: next,
  2012→                }),
  2013→              )
  2014→            : shouldViewTransition.types
  2015→
  2016→        startViewTransitionParams = {
  2017→          update: fn,
  2018→          types: resolvedViewTransitionTypes,
  2019→        }

  2779→        }

  2785→      ...s,

  2822→          ...s,
  2823→          cachedMatches: [],

  2900→    )

  2989→    if (!match) {

  3013→  _handleNotFound = (
  3014→    matches: Array<AnyRouteMatch>,
  3015→    err: NotFoundError,
  3016→    {

  3019→      updateMatch?: (
  3020→        id: string,
  3021→        updater: (match: AnyRouteMatch) => AnyRouteMatch,
  3022→      ) => void
  3023→    } = {},
  3024→  ) => {
  3025→    // Find the route that should handle the not found error
  3026→    // First check if a specific route is requested to show the error
  3027→    const routeCursor = this.routesById[err.routeId ?? ''] ?? this.routeTree

  3030→    // Setup routesByRouteId object for quick access

  3032→      matchesByRouteId[match.routeId] = match

  3037→      !routeCursor.options.notFoundComponent &&
  3038→      (this.options as any)?.defaultNotFoundComponent

  3041→        this.options as any

  3047→      routeCursor.options.notFoundComponent,
  3048→      'No notFoundComponent found. Please set a notFoundComponent on your route or provide a defaultNotFoundComponent to the router.',
  3049→    )

  3051→    // Find the match for this route
  3052→    const matchForRoute = matchesByRouteId[routeCursor.id]
  3053→
  3054→    invariant(
  3055→      matchForRoute,
  3056→      'Could not find match for route: ' + routeCursor.id,
  3057→    )
  3058→
  3059→    // Assign the error to the match - using non-null assertion since we've checked with invariant

  3061→      ...prev,
  3062→      status: 'notFound',
  3063→      error: err,
  3064→      isFetching: false,
  3065→    }))

  3067→    if ((err as any).routerCode === 'BEFORE_LOAD' && routeCursor.parentRoute) {

  3070→        updateMatch,
  3071→      })
  3072→    }
  3073→  }
  3074→
  3075→  hasNotFoundMatch = () => {

  3077→      (d) => d.status === 'notFound' || d.globalNotFound,

  3079→  }

  3086→// A function that takes an import() argument which is a function and returns a new function that will
  3087→// proxy arguments from the caller to the imported function, retaining all type
  3088→// information along the way
  3089→export function lazyFn<
  3090→  T extends Record<string, (...args: Array<any>) => any>,
  3091→  TKey extends keyof T = 'default',
  3092→>(fn: () => Promise<T>, key?: TKey) {
  3093→  return async (
  3094→    ...args: Parameters<T[TKey]>
  3095→  ): Promise<Awaited<ReturnType<T[TKey]>>> => {
  3096→    const imported = await fn()
  3097→    return imported[key || 'default'](...args)
  3098→  }
  3099→}

  3101→export function getInitialRouterState(
  3102→  location: ParsedLocation,
  3103→): RouterState<any> {
  3104→  return {
  3105→    loadedAt: 0,
  3106→    isLoading: false,
  3107→    isTransitioning: false,
  3108→    status: 'idle',
  3109→    resolvedLocation: undefined,
  3110→    location,
  3111→    matches: [],
  3112→    pendingMatches: [],
  3113→    cachedMatches: [],
  3114→    statusCode: 200,
  3115→  }

  3117→
  3118→function validateSearch(validateSearch: AnyValidator, input: unknown): unknown {
  3119→  if (validateSearch == null) return {}
  3120→
  3121→  if ('~standard' in validateSearch) {
  3122→    const result = validateSearch['~standard'].validate(input)
  3123→
  3124→    if (result instanceof Promise)
  3125→      throw new SearchParamError('Async validation not supported')
  3126→
  3127→    if (result.issues)
  3128→      throw new SearchParamError(JSON.stringify(result.issues, undefined, 2), {
  3129→        cause: result,
  3130→      })
  3131→
  3132→    return result.value
  3133→  }
  3134→
  3135→  if ('parse' in validateSearch) {
  3136→    return validateSearch.parse(input)
  3137→  }
  3138→
  3139→  if (typeof validateSearch === 'function') {
  3140→    return validateSearch(input)
  3141→  }
  3142→
  3143→  return {}
  3144→}

  3146→export const componentTypes = [
  3147→  'component',
  3148→  'errorComponent',

  3154→  for (const componentType of componentTypes) {

  3156→      return true

  3159→  return false

  3162→interface RouteLike {

  3174→
  3175→export type ProcessRouteTreeResult<TRouteLike extends RouteLike> = {
  3176→  routesById: Record<string, TRouteLike>

  3180→export function processRouteTree<TRouteLike extends RouteLike>({
  3181→  routeTree,
  3182→  initRoute,
  3183→}: {
  3184→  routeTree: TRouteLike
  3185→  initRoute?: (route: TRouteLike, index: number) => void
  3186→}): ProcessRouteTreeResult<TRouteLike> {
  3187→  const routesById = {} as Record<string, TRouteLike>
  3188→  const routesByPath = {} as Record<string, TRouteLike>
  3189→

  3191→    childRoutes.forEach((childRoute, i) => {
  3192→      initRoute?.(childRoute, i)
  3193→
  3194→      const existingRoute = routesById[childRoute.id]
  3195→
  3196→      invariant(
  3197→        !existingRoute,
  3198→        `Duplicate routes found with id: ${String(childRoute.id)}`,
  3199→      )
  3200→
  3201→      routesById[childRoute.id] = childRoute
  3202→
  3203→      if (!childRoute.isRoot && childRoute.path) {
  3204→        const trimmedFullPath = trimPathRight(childRoute.fullPath)
  3205→        if (
  3206→          !routesByPath[trimmedFullPath] ||
  3207→          childRoute.fullPath.endsWith('/')

  3209→          routesByPath[trimmedFullPath] = childRoute
  3210→        }
  3211→      }
  3212→
  3213→      const children = childRoute.children as Array<TRouteLike>
  3214→
  3215→      if (children?.length) {
  3216→        recurseRoutes(children)
  3217→      }
  3218→    })
  3219→  }
  3220→
  3221→  recurseRoutes([routeTree])
  3222→
  3223→  const scoredRoutes: Array<{
  3224→    child: TRouteLike
  3225→    trimmed: string
  3226→    parsed: ReturnType<typeof parsePathname>
  3227→    index: number

  3229→  }> = []
  3230→
  3231→  const routes: Array<TRouteLike> = Object.values(routesById)
  3232→
  3233→  routes.forEach((d, i) => {
  3234→    if (d.isRoot || !d.path) {
  3235→      return
  3236→    }
  3237→
  3238→    const trimmed = trimPathLeft(d.fullPath)
  3239→    const parsed = parsePathname(trimmed)
  3240→
  3241→    // Removes the leading slash if it is not the only remaining segment
  3242→    while (parsed.length > 1 && parsed[0]?.value === '/') {
  3243→      parsed.shift()
  3244→    }
  3245→
  3246→    const scores = parsed.map((segment) => {
  3247→      if (segment.value === '/') {
  3248→        return 0.75
  3249→      }
  3250→
  3251→      if (segment.type === 'param') {
  3252→        if (segment.prefixSegment && segment.suffixSegment) {
  3253→          return 0.55
  3254→        }
  3255→
  3256→        if (segment.prefixSegment) {
  3257→          return 0.52
  3258→        }
  3259→
  3260→        if (segment.suffixSegment) {
  3261→          return 0.51
  3262→        }
  3263→
  3264→        return 0.5
  3265→      }
  3266→
  3267→      if (segment.type === 'optional-param') {
  3268→        if (segment.prefixSegment && segment.suffixSegment) {
  3269→          return 0.45
  3270→        }
  3271→
  3272→        if (segment.prefixSegment) {
  3273→          return 0.42
  3274→        }
  3275→
  3276→        if (segment.suffixSegment) {
  3277→          return 0.41
  3278→        }
  3279→
  3280→        return 0.4
  3281→      }
  3282→
  3283→      if (segment.type === 'wildcard') {
  3284→        if (segment.prefixSegment && segment.suffixSegment) {
  3285→          return 0.3
  3286→        }
  3287→
  3288→        if (segment.prefixSegment) {
  3289→          return 0.27
  3290→        }
  3291→
  3292→        if (segment.suffixSegment) {
  3293→          return 0.26
  3294→        }
  3295→
  3296→        return 0.25
  3297→      }
  3298→
  3299→      return 1
  3300→    })
  3301→
  3302→    scoredRoutes.push({ child: d, trimmed, parsed, index: i, scores })
  3303→  })
  3304→
  3305→  const flatRoutes = scoredRoutes
  3306→    .sort((a, b) => {
  3307→      const minLength = Math.min(a.scores.length, b.scores.length)
  3308→
  3309→      // Sort by segment-by-segment score comparison ONLY for the common prefix
  3310→      for (let i = 0; i < minLength; i++) {
  3311→        if (a.scores[i] !== b.scores[i]) {
  3312→          return b.scores[i]! - a.scores[i]!
  3313→        }
  3314→      }
  3315→
  3316→      // If all common segments have equal scores, then consider length and specificity
  3317→      if (a.scores.length !== b.scores.length) {
  3318→        // Count optional parameters in each route
  3319→        const aOptionalCount = a.parsed.filter(
  3320→          (seg) => seg.type === 'optional-param',
  3321→        ).length
  3322→        const bOptionalCount = b.parsed.filter(
  3323→          (seg) => seg.type === 'optional-param',
  3324→        ).length
  3325→
  3326→        // If different number of optional parameters, fewer optional parameters wins (more specific)
  3327→        if (aOptionalCount !== bOptionalCount) {
  3328→          return aOptionalCount - bOptionalCount
  3329→        }
  3330→
  3331→        // If same number of optional parameters, longer path wins (for static segments)
  3332→        return b.scores.length - a.scores.length
  3333→      }
  3334→
  3335→      // Sort by min available parsed value for alphabetical ordering
  3336→      for (let i = 0; i < minLength; i++) {
  3337→        if (a.parsed[i]!.value !== b.parsed[i]!.value) {
  3338→          return a.parsed[i]!.value > b.parsed[i]!.value ? 1 : -1
  3339→        }
  3340→      }
  3341→
  3342→      // Sort by original index
  3343→      return a.index - b.index
  3344→    })
  3345→    .map((d, i) => {
  3346→      d.child.rank = i
  3347→      return d.child
  3348→    })
  3349→
  3350→  return { routesById, routesByPath, flatRoutes }
  3351→}
  3352→
  3353→export function getMatchedRoutes<TRouteLike extends RouteLike>({
  3354→  pathname,
  3355→  routePathname,
  3356→  basepath,
  3357→  caseSensitive,
  3358→  routesByPath,
  3359→  routesById,
  3360→  flatRoutes,
  3361→}: {
  3362→  pathname: string
  3363→  routePathname?: string
  3364→  basepath: string
  3365→  caseSensitive?: boolean
  3366→  routesByPath: Record<string, TRouteLike>
  3367→  routesById: Record<string, TRouteLike>
  3368→  flatRoutes: Array<TRouteLike>
  3369→}) {
  3370→  let routeParams: Record<string, string> = {}
  3371→  const trimmedPath = trimPathRight(pathname)
  3372→  const getMatchedParams = (route: TRouteLike) => {
  3373→    const result = matchPathname(basepath, trimmedPath, {
  3374→      to: route.fullPath,
  3375→      caseSensitive: route.options?.caseSensitive ?? caseSensitive,
  3376→      fuzzy: false,
  3377→    })
  3378→    return result
  3379→  }
  3380→
  3381→  let foundRoute: TRouteLike | undefined =
  3382→    routePathname !== undefined ? routesByPath[routePathname] : undefined
  3383→  if (foundRoute) {
  3384→    routeParams = getMatchedParams(foundRoute)!
  3385→  } else {
  3386→    foundRoute = flatRoutes.find((route) => {
  3387→      const matchedParams = getMatchedParams(route)
  3388→
  3389→      if (matchedParams) {
  3390→        routeParams = matchedParams
  3391→        return true
  3392→      }
  3393→
  3394→      return false
  3395→    })
  3396→  }
  3397→
  3398→  let routeCursor: TRouteLike = foundRoute || routesById[rootRouteId]!
  3399→
  3400→  const matchedRoutes: Array<TRouteLike> = [routeCursor]
  3401→
  3402→  while (routeCursor.parentRoute) {
  3403→    routeCursor = routeCursor.parentRoute as TRouteLike
  3404→    matchedRoutes.unshift(routeCursor)
  3405→  }
  3406→
  3407→  return { matchedRoutes, routeParams, foundRoute }
  3408→}
  3409→
  3410→function applySearchMiddleware({
  3411→  search,
  3412→  dest,
  3413→  destRoutes,
  3414→  _includeValidateSearch,
  3415→}: {
  3416→  search: any
  3417→  dest: BuildNextOptions
  3418→  destRoutes: Array<AnyRoute>
  3419→  _includeValidateSearch: boolean | undefined
  3420→}) {
  3421→  const allMiddlewares =
  3422→    destRoutes.reduce(
  3423→      (acc, route) => {
  3424→        const middlewares: Array<SearchMiddleware<any>> = []
  3425→
  3426→        if ('search' in route.options) {
  3427→          if (route.options.search?.middlewares) {
  3428→            middlewares.push(...route.options.search.middlewares)
  3429→          }
  3430→        }
  3431→        // TODO remove preSearchFilters and postSearchFilters in v2
  3432→        else if (
  3433→          route.options.preSearchFilters ||
  3434→          route.options.postSearchFilters
  3435→        ) {
  3436→          const legacyMiddleware: SearchMiddleware<any> = ({
  3437→            search,
  3438→            next,
  3439→          }) => {
  3440→            let nextSearch = search
  3441→
  3442→            if (
  3443→              'preSearchFilters' in route.options &&
  3444→              route.options.preSearchFilters
  3445→            ) {
  3446→              nextSearch = route.options.preSearchFilters.reduce(
  3447→                (prev, next) => next(prev),
  3448→                search,
  3449→              )
  3450→            }
  3451→
  3452→            const result = next(nextSearch)
  3453→
  3454→            if (
  3455→              'postSearchFilters' in route.options &&
  3456→              route.options.postSearchFilters
  3457→            ) {
  3458→              return route.options.postSearchFilters.reduce(
  3459→                (prev, next) => next(prev),
  3460→                result,
  3461→              )
  3462→            }
  3463→
  3464→            return result
  3465→          }
  3466→          middlewares.push(legacyMiddleware)
  3467→        }
  3468→
  3469→        if (_includeValidateSearch && route.options.validateSearch) {
  3470→          const validate: SearchMiddleware<any> = ({ search, next }) => {
  3471→            const result = next(search)
  3472→            try {
  3473→              const validatedSearch = {
  3474→                ...result,
  3475→                ...(validateSearch(route.options.validateSearch, result) ?? {}),
  3476→              }
  3477→              return validatedSearch
  3478→            } catch {
  3479→              // ignore errors here because they are already handled in matchRoutes
  3480→              return result
  3481→            }
  3482→          }
  3483→
  3484→          middlewares.push(validate)
  3485→        }
  3486→
  3487→        return acc.concat(middlewares)
  3488→      },
  3489→      [] as Array<SearchMiddleware<any>>,
  3490→    ) ?? []
  3491→
  3492→  // the chain ends here since `next` is not called
  3493→  const final: SearchMiddleware<any> = ({ search }) => {
  3494→    if (!dest.search) {
  3495→      return {}
  3496→    }
  3497→    if (dest.search === true) {
  3498→      return search
  3499→    }
  3500→    return functionalUpdate(dest.search, search)
  3501→  }
  3502→
  3503→  allMiddlewares.push(final)
  3504→
  3505→  const applyNext = (index: number, currentSearch: any): any => {
  3506→    // no more middlewares left, return the current search
  3507→    if (index >= allMiddlewares.length) {
  3508→      return currentSearch
  3509→    }
  3510→
  3511→    const middleware = allMiddlewares[index]!
  3512→
  3513→    const next = (newSearch: any): any => {
  3514→      return applyNext(index + 1, newSearch)
  3515→    }
  3516→
  3517→    return middleware({ search: currentSearch, next })
  3518→  }
  3519→
  3520→  // Start applying middlewares
  3521→  return applyNext(0, search)
  3522→}
  3523→

import { Store, batch } from '@tanstack/store'
import {
  createBrowserHistory,
  createMemoryHistory,
  parseHref,
} from '@tanstack/history'
import invariant from 'tiny-invariant'
import {
  createControlledPromise,
  deepEqual,
  functionalUpdate,
  last,
  pick,
  replaceEqualDeep,
} from './utils'
import {
  cleanPath,
  interpolatePath,
  joinPaths,
  matchPathname,
  parsePathname,
  resolvePath,
  trimPath,
  trimPathLeft,
  trimPathRight,
} from './path'
import { isNotFound } from './not-found'
import { setupScrollRestoration } from './scroll-restoration'
import { defaultParseSearch, defaultStringifySearch } from './searchParams'
import { rootRouteId } from './root'
import { isRedirect, redirect } from './redirect'
import type { SearchParser, SearchSerializer } from './searchParams'
import type { AnyRedirect, ResolvedRedirect } from './redirect'
import type {
  HistoryLocation,
  HistoryState,
  ParsedHistoryState,
  RouterHistory,
} from '@tanstack/history'
import type {
  Awaitable,
  ControlledPromise,
  NoInfer,
  NonNullableUpdater,
  PickAsRequired,
  Updater,
} from './utils'
import type { ParsedLocation } from './location'
import type {
  AnyContext,
  AnyRoute,
  AnyRouteWithContext,
  BeforeLoadContextOptions,
  LoaderFnContext,
  MakeRemountDepsOptionsUnion,
  RouteContextOptions,
  RouteMask,
  SearchMiddleware,
  SsrContextOptions,
} from './route'
import type {
  FullSearchSchema,
  RouteById,
  RoutePaths,
  RoutesById,
  RoutesByPath,
} from './routeInfo'
import type {
  AnyRouteMatch,
  MakeRouteMatch,
  MakeRouteMatchUnion,
  MatchRouteOptions,
} from './Matches'
import type {
  BuildLocationFn,
  CommitLocationOptions,
  NavigateFn,
} from './RouterProvider'
import type { Manifest } from './manifest'
import type { AnySchema, AnyValidator } from './validators'
import type { NavigateOptions, ResolveRelativePath, ToOptions } from './link'
import type { NotFoundError } from './not-found'

declare global {
  interface Window {
    __TSR_ROUTER__?: AnyRouter
  }
}

export type ControllablePromise<T = any> = Promise<T> & {
  resolve: (value: T) => void
  reject: (value?: any) => void
}

export type InjectedHtmlEntry = Promise<string>

export interface DefaultRegister {
  router: AnyRouter
}

export interface Register extends DefaultRegister {
  // router: Router
}

export type RegisteredRouter = Register['router']

export type DefaultRemountDepsFn<TRouteTree extends AnyRoute> = (
  opts: MakeRemountDepsOptionsUnion<TRouteTree>,
) => any

export interface DefaultRouterOptionsExtensions {}

export interface RouterOptionsExtensions
  extends DefaultRouterOptionsExtensions {}

export interface RouterOptions<
  TRouteTree extends AnyRoute,
  TTrailingSlashOption extends TrailingSlashOption,
  TDefaultStructuralSharingOption extends boolean = false,
  TRouterHistory extends RouterHistory = RouterHistory,
  TDehydrated extends Record<string, any> = Record<string, any>,
> extends RouterOptionsExtensions {
  /**
   * The history object that will be used to manage the browser history.
   *
   * If not provided, a new createBrowserHistory instance will be created and used.
   *
   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#history-property)
   * @link [Guide](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/history-types)
   */
  history?: TRouterHistory
  /**
   * A function that will be used to stringify search params when generating links.
   *
   * @default defaultStringifySearch
   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#stringifysearch-method)
   * @link [Guide](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/custom-search-param-serialization)
   */
  stringifySearch?: SearchSerializer
  /**
   * A function that will be used to parse search params when parsing the current location.
   *
   * @default defaultParseSearch
